Tests the Math.atan function to verify it returns +0 for an input of +0.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.atan` function in JavaScript. It checks that the arctangent of positive zero (`+0`) is correctly evaluated to positive zero (`+0`). This test ensures that the `Math.atan` function conforms to the expected mathematical behavior for this specific input. The script uses a single assertion to validate this functionality.
